name_en: Stadio San Siro (Stazione di Milano San Siro)

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso principale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si comprano i biglietti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see COM-prah-noh ee bee-LYET-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, ground floor.

responses.english: At the ticket office, ground floor.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre lo stadio, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh loh STAH-dyo, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah ee bee-LYET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, bisogna prenotare il tour online, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, bee-ZOH-nyah preh-noh-TAH-reh ee toor on-LEEN, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si fanno i controlli di sicurezza, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see FAN-noh ee kon-TROL-lee dee see-koo-RET-sah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua la fila qui, poi dentro.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LAH FEE-lah KW-ee POH-ee DEHNT-roh
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the line here, then inside.

responses.english: Follow the line here, then inside.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LAH FEE-lah KW-ee POH-ee DEHNT-roh
responses.french: Segua la fila qui, poi dentro.
